members.name: GetDefaultTextureParameter
members.signature: public Texture GetDefaultTextureParameter(StringName name, int index)
members.summary: Returns the texture that is set as default for the specified parameter. [b]Note:[/b] [param name] must match the name of the uniform in the code exactly. [b]Note:[/b] If the sampler array is used use [param index] to access the specified texture.

members.name: GetMode
members.summary: Returns the shader mode for the shader.

members.name: GetShaderUniformList
members.summary: Returns the list of shader uniforms that can be assigned to a [ShaderMaterial], for use with [method ShaderMaterial.set_shader_parameter] and [method ShaderMaterial.get_shader_parameter]. The parameters returned are contained in dictionaries in a similar format to the ones returned by [method Object.get_property_list]. If argument [param get_groups] is [code]true[/code], parameter grouping hints are also included in the list.

members.name: InspectNativeShaderCode
members.summary: Only available when running in the editor. Opens a popup that visualizes the generated shader code, including all variants and internal shader code. See also [method Material.inspect_native_shader_code].

members.name: SetDefaultTextureParameter
members.signature: public void SetDefaultTextureParameter(StringName name, Texture texture, int index)
members.summary: Sets the default texture to be used with a texture uniform. The default is used if a texture is not set in the [ShaderMaterial]. [b]Note:[/b] [param name] must match the name of the uniform in the code exactly. [b]Note:[/b] If the sampler array is used use [param index] to access the specified texture.

members.name: Code
members.summary: Returns the shader's code as the user has written it, not the full generated code used internally.

values.name: MODE_CANVAS_ITEM
values.summary: Mode used to draw all 2D objects.

values.name: MODE_FOG
values.summary: Mode used for setting the color and density of volumetric fog effect.

values.name: MODE_PARTICLES
values.summary: Mode used to calculate particle information on a per-particle basis. Not used for drawing.

values.name: MODE_SKY
values.summary: Mode used for drawing skies. Only works with shaders attached to [Sky] objects.

values.name: MODE_SPATIAL
values.summary: Mode used to draw all 3D objects.

values.name: MODE_TEXTURE_BLIT
values.summary: Mode used for drawing to DrawableTexture resources via blit calls.

constants.name: MODE_SPATIAL
constants.summary: Mode used to draw all 3D objects.

constants.name: MODE_CANVAS_ITEM
constants.summary: Mode used to draw all 2D objects.

constants.name: MODE_PARTICLES
constants.summary: Mode used to calculate particle information on a per-particle basis. Not used for drawing.

constants.name: MODE_SKY
constants.summary: Mode used for drawing skies. Only works with shaders attached to [Sky] objects.

constants.name: MODE_FOG
constants.summary: Mode used for setting the color and density of volumetric fog effect.

constants.name: MODE_TEXTURE_BLIT
constants.summary: Mode used for drawing to DrawableTexture resources via blit calls.
